label: Food
description: Comprehensive coverage of India's food industry — from farm to fork. FCI's Food exhibitions connect manufacturers, processors, retailers, and technology providers across the entire food value chain.
indexDescription: Food, Beverage, Dairy, Bakery, Sea Food, Cold Storage, Packaging and allied sectors

label: Energy
description: Powering India's green energy transition. FCI's energy exhibitions showcase cutting-edge technologies from electrical solutions to renewable energy innovations and storage systems.
indexDescription: Electrical, Solar, LED, Energy Storage and allied sectors

label: Auto
description: Accelerating India's automotive future. From conventional vehicles to EV technology, FCI's automotive shows bring together the entire automotive ecosystem.
indexDescription: Automotive, Components, EV, Batteries, Aftermarket Solutions and allied sectors

label: Health
description: Connecting India's healthcare ecosystem for better outcomes. FCI's healthcare exhibitions bring together hospitals, medical device manufacturers, pharma companies and innovators.
indexDescription: Healthcare, Medical, Pharma and allied sectors

label: Build
description: Building India's future with smart, sustainable infrastructure. FCI's construction exhibitions cover the complete built environment — from raw materials to smart building technologies.
indexDescription: Construction, Infrastructure, Smart Building & Security Solutions, Building Materials and allied sectors
